# Coinet GitHub Workflows (.github)

> Automated workflows, PR bots, issue templates, and community standards for Coinet. Collaborative, secure, and inspiring.

---

## 🚀 Quick Start
1. Open a PR or issue
2. Workflows run automatically

---

## 🏗️ Structure
- `/workflows` — GitHub Actions workflows
- `/ISSUE_TEMPLATE` — Issue templates
- `/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md` — PR template
- `/CODEOWNERS` — Code owners

---

## 📦 Usage Example
- PRs are checked for lint, test, build, a11y, and docs
- Issues are triaged and labeled automatically

---

> **Build the future of crypto analytics and trading.**
> **Pixel-perfect. Infinitely extensible. Designed for humans.**
